req.title: Immunization record
req.statement: A clinician shall record an Immunization with administered date not in the future.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-010 constrains the administeredDate of an Immunization to be <= today. Three partitions exist: (1) past dates (valid), (2) today (boundary/valid), (3) future dates (invalid). EP covers a clearly-past date as the representative valid partition member. BVA covers today as the upper-valid boundary. NEG covers a clearly-future date to confirm the 422 error pathway. A fourth DT test covers the compound decision where a future date is combined with an otherwise-valid payload to confirm the date field alone triggers rejection.

tests.name: test_immunization_past_date_accepted
preconditions: Caller is authenticated as a clinician (role:clinician)
actions: Build an Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime set to 30 days in the past
POST payload to /Immunization with clinician credentials
expected: Response body contains an id field
Response occurrenceDateTime matches the submitted past date
trace: R-HLT-010: administered date not in the future
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta

def test_immunization_past_date_accepted(clinician_client, valid_patient_ref):
    past_date = (date.today() - timedelta(days=30)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "COVID-19"},
        "patient": {"reference": valid_patient_ref},
        "occurrenceDateTime": past_date
    }
    resp = clinician_client.post("/Immunization", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert "id" in body
    assert body["occurrenceDateTime"] == past_date

tests.name: test_immunization_today_boundary_accepted
preconditions: Caller is authenticated as a clinician (role:clinician)
actions: Build an Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime set to today (server date)
POST payload to /Immunization with clinician credentials
expected: Response body contains an id field
trace: R-HLT-010: upper boundary — today is the last permissible date
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date

def test_immunization_today_boundary_accepted(clinician_client, valid_patient_ref):
    today = date.today().isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "Influenza"},
        "patient": {"reference": valid_patient_ref},
        "occurrenceDateTime": today
    }
    resp = clinician_client.post("/Immunization", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert "id" in body
    assert body["occurrenceDateTime"] == today

tests.name: test_immunization_future_date_rejected
preconditions: Caller is authenticated as a clinician (role:clinician)
actions: Build an Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime set to tomorrow
POST payload to /Immunization with clinician credentials
expected: Response body contains a diagnostic message referencing the date field
trace: R-HLT-010: error pathway — 422 when date > today
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta

def test_immunization_future_date_rejected(clinician_client, valid_patient_ref):
    future_date = (date.today() + timedelta(days=1)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "MMR"},
        "patient": {"reference": valid_patient_ref},
        "occurrenceDateTime": future_date
    }
    resp = clinician_client.post("/Immunization", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    diag = str(body).lower()
    assert "occurrence" in diag or "date" in diag

tests.name: test_immunization_far_future_date_rejected
preconditions: Caller is authenticated as a clinician (role:clinician)
All payload fields except occurrenceDateTime are fully valid
actions: Set occurrenceDateTime to one year in the future
POST payload to /Immunization with clinician credentials
expected: HTTP 422 Unprocessable Entity is returned regardless of other field validity
Only the date field triggers the error (decision: future date => reject)
trace: R-HLT-010: error pathway — 422 when date > today
R-HLT-010: decision — future date alone is sufficient to reject an otherwise valid record
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta

def test_immunization_far_future_date_rejected(clinician_client, valid_patient_ref):
    far_future = (date.today() + timedelta(days=365)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"coding": [{"system": "http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/cvx", "code": "08"}]},
        "patient": {"reference": valid_patient_ref},
        "occurrenceDateTime": far_future,
        "primarySource": True
    }
    resp = clinician_client.post("/Immunization", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    issues = str(body).lower()
    assert "occurrence" in issues or "date" in issues or "future" in issues
